generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A centralized Building Control System (BCS) with embedded control logic for lighting and HVAC systems, integrated via BIM-enriched models for real-time bidirectional control with the Digital Twin"
]

instance LightingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Lighting control actuators modeled within BIM for TwinLight project, enabling dynamic adjustment based on occupancy and energy optimization policies"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingControlDataTransmitted
]

instance HVACControlActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "HVAC control actuators with BIM-defined configurations for temperature and ventilation management, synchronized with reinforcement learning feedback from BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HVACControlDataTransmitted
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy energy consumption sensors embedded in the LEED Platinum building, feeding real-time operational data via BOREALIS project"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detection sensors (e.g., BOREALIS project) measuring visual comfort metrics and tenant activity patterns"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensors embedded in the building infrastructure, providing environmental comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting quality sensors measuring illuminance and color temperature for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Air quality sensors monitoring CO₂ and particulate matter levels for indoor environmental health monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance LightingControlDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingControlActuator
]

instance HVACControlDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HVACControlActuator
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingQualitySensor
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualitySensor
]

// C10: Core Models
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Core BIM model enriched with BCS runtime semantics (sensor configurations, control logic) via model-driven transformations for TwinLight/BOREALIS integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToDTTransformation
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime semantics model extracted from BIM models containing sensor configurations and control logic definitions for real-time DT operation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToDTTransformation
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D Unreal Engine 5 model representing the physical building for immersive monitoring and simulation visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMToDTTransformation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating transformations from BIM to runtime artifacts (model-to-model/model-to-text) for DT generation"
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware platform enabling real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical sensors and Digital Twin via standardized IoT protocols"
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization of the physical building for interactive DT monitoring and simulation"
]

instance BOREALISRLFeedback : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework providing post-occupancy analytics and adaptive control policies for DT optimization"
]

instance CustomDTPluginFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for DT Engineers to deploy domain-specific plugins (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control policies)"
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing live data feeds from physical sensors to the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:enables LightingControlActuator,
                      HVACControlActuator,
                      EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                      OccupancySensor,
                      TemperatureSensor,
                      LightingQualitySensor,
                      AirQualitySensor
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyPerformanceInsight,
                      OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service implementing BOREALIS reinforcement learning for energy efficiency optimization and operational balancing"
    DTDFVocab:enables BOREALISRLFeedback
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyAction,
                      ControlPolicyUpdate
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service framework enabling deployment of domain-specific plugins (IoT analytics, AI-driven control policies) via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomDTPluginFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsPlugin
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capability for performance analysis during design and operation phases using BIM-derived parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealEngineVisualizationModel
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignPhaseSimulation,
                      OperationalSimulation
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics and performance benchmarks derived from sensor data for operational optimization"
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Occupancy analysis and visual comfort metrics derived from sensor data to inform facility management decisions"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated energy efficiency adjustments (e.g., HVAC/lighting control) triggered by predictive analytics and reinforcement learning feedback"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime updates to control policies based on BOREALIS reinforcement learning iterations and performance feedback"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomAnalyticsPlugin : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Domain-specific analytics processing executed via custom DT plugins (e.g., IoT data integration, advanced pattern recognition)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DesignPhaseSimulation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Performance analysis simulations conducted during design phases using BIM-derived parameters and visualization models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OperationalSimulation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime performance simulations during building operation phases to validate control strategies and optimize operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains EnrichedBIMModel,
                 RuntimeSemanticsModel,
                 LightingControlActuator,
                 HVACControlActuator,
                 EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                 OccupancySensor,
                 TemperatureSensor,
                 LightingQualitySensor,
                 AirQualitySensor
]

instance DigitalTwinCoreEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMToDTTransformation,
                 EclipseHonoMiddleware,
                 BOREALISRLFeedback,
                 CustomDTPluginFramework,
                 UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals and commands generated by the DT are transmitted back to physical building systems via the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and BIM-based control configurations (e.g., TwinLight’s BIM-centric control framework). This enables automated adjustments to lighting, HVAC, or other BCS components based on DT-driven optimization algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The framework supports **real-time synchronization** (sub-second latency) for critical operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control commands) and **batch processing** for non-critical updates (e.g., periodic BIM model refreshes). The time-scale is optimized for **live operational monitoring** (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning updates) and **post-occupancy data-driven adjustments** (e.g., adaptive lighting control)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **centralized hub** with:
   - A **core DT** integrating BIM, sensor data, and control logic via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
   - **Decentralized services** (e.g., lighting, HVAC, analytics) deployed via standardized extension points, allowing for horizontal integration of domain-specific plugins (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven optimization).
   - **Orchestration**: Unified control via BIM-based BCS configurations (e.g., TwinLight’s layered architecture) ensuring interoperability across physical and virtual assets."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the entire building life cycle, covering:
   1. **Design Phase**: Enriched BIM models with device configurations (e.g., TwinLight’s BIM-centric control logic).
   2. **Construction Phase**: Automated extraction of physical asset metadata from BIM for DT deployment.
   3. **Operation Phase**: Real-time synchronization with physical assets via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning).
   4. **Refurbishment Phase**: Modular updates via DT services (e.g., custom plugins) without redeployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through:
   - **Semantic Alignment**: BIM models are enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor configurations) to minimize semantic drift (e.g., Abbasi et al.’s approach).
   - **Validation**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to measure the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart in the Living Lab case study.
   - **Verification**: Automated model validation (e.g., via model-to-model transformations) and real-time synchronization checks (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware).
   - **Uncertainty Management**: Post-occupancy data (e.g., BOREALIS’ sensor feedback) is used to iteratively refine control policies and DT models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and the DT. The framework automates metadata extraction (e.g., device IDs, endpoint addresses) to facilitate seamless integration. While the documents do not specify protocols like MQTT, the emphasis is on **real-time synchronization** and middleware-based connectivity for operational control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** leveraging cloud/edge infrastructure for runtime components. Unreal Engine 5 visualizations are likely hosted on dedicated servers or cloud platforms for high-performance rendering. The framework supports modular deployment, allowing services (e.g., analytics, control plugins) to be added/removed dynamically without redeployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs via:
   - **Standardized Extension Points**: DT Engineers can integrate custom services (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control) without disrupting core DT functionality.
   - **BIM-Based Interoperability**: Unified semantics (e.g., device models, control logic) enable seamless exchange with external systems (e.g., facility management platforms, IoT gateways).
   - **Middleware Middleware**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto supports interoperability with heterogeneous IoT devices and cloud services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework follows:
   - **BIM Standards**: BIM as the semantic foundation for device modeling and control logic.
   - **MDE Standards**: Model-driven transformations (e.g., model-to-model/model-to-text) for automated DT deployment.
   - **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and interoperability.
   - **AECO-Specific Standards**: Compliance with AECO domain requirements (e.g., life-cycle optimization, real-time monitoring) via BIM-centric control configurations and standardized extension points."
]
